mapper.select: SELECT b.*, i.imageFilename, m.memberNickName, (SELECT COUNT(replyNo) FROM reply WHERE boardMyhomeArticleNo = b.boardMyhomeArticleNo) AS totalReply FROM boardMyhome b LEFT JOIN image i ON b.boardMyhomeArticleNo = i.articleNo AND i.imageType = '커버' LEFT JOIN member m ON b.memberId = m.memberId WHERE b.boardMyhomeArticleNo IN ( SELECT boardMyhomeArticleNo FROM boardMyHomeLikes WHERE memberId = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY b.boardMyhomeUpdated DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM boardMyHomeLikes WHERE boardMyhomeArticleNo = #{boardMyhomeArticleNo} AND memberId = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(memberId) FROM boardMyHomeLikes WHERE boardMyhomeArticleNo IN ( SELECT boardMyhomeArticleNo FROM boardMyhome WHERE memberId = #{memberId} )
